note: Package manifest retains licensing notes as written record metadata only; no runtime or release gating is enforced by license fields.

packages.label: Reader texts
packages.description: Static Bible reader with retained text editions and private Strong's word-study data.

feature_packs.label: BSB text
feature_packs.description: Berean Study Bible verse text shards.
feature_packs.license_note: Public domain as of 2023-04-30 per Berean Bible free licensing.

feature_packs.label: KJV text
feature_packs.description: King James Version verse text shards.
feature_packs.license_note: Public domain in the United States.

feature_packs.label: BSB Strong's overlay
feature_packs.description: Token-level Strong's mappings for the Berean Study Bible reader.
feature_packs.license_note: Licensing/provenance notes retained in data/license-matrix.json as written record metadata.

feature_packs.label: Hebrew lexicon
feature_packs.description: Chunked Hebrew Strong's lexicon entries for word-study panels.
feature_packs.license_note: Licensing/provenance notes retained in data/license-matrix.json as written record metadata.

feature_packs.label: Greek lexicon
feature_packs.description: Chunked Greek Strong's lexicon entries for word-study panels.
feature_packs.license_note: Licensing/provenance notes retained in data/license-matrix.json as written record metadata.

feature_packs.label: Cross references
feature_packs.description: Book-level cross-reference datasets used in verse study tabs.
feature_packs.license_note: Licensing/provenance notes retained in data/license-matrix.json as written record metadata.

feature_packs.label: Commentary verse index
feature_packs.description: Aggregated and source-backed commentary links keyed by verse.
feature_packs.license_note: Licensing/provenance notes retained in data/license-matrix.json as written record metadata.

feature_packs.label: Book outlines
feature_packs.description: Structured section outlines for each book.
feature_packs.license_note: Licensing/provenance notes retained in data/license-matrix.json as written record metadata.

feature_packs.label: Search indexes
feature_packs.description: Generated verse and study search shards and manifest.
feature_packs.license_note: Generated local index data retained for app functionality.

feature_packs.label: Hebrew interlinear
feature_packs.description: Token-level Hebrew interlinear dataset used by interlinear views.
feature_packs.license_note: Derived interlinear data retained with provenance notes in data/license-matrix.json.

feature_packs.label: Greek interlinear
feature_packs.description: Token-level Greek interlinear dataset used by interlinear views.
feature_packs.license_note: Derived interlinear data retained with provenance notes in data/license-matrix.json.

feature_packs.label: Word-map analysis
feature_packs.description: Canonical word-map spans generated from packaged Strong's overlays and verse text.
feature_packs.license_note: Generated from packaged datasets for reproducible local analysis workflows.

feature_packs.label: Graph analysis
feature_packs.description: Cross-reference graph summaries generated per book and globally.
feature_packs.license_note: Generated from packaged datasets for reproducible local analysis workflows.
